delivery_criteria: predictions.tsv populated with all 7 columns: date, agent, prediction, evidence, result, correct, model_update
predictions are graded (correct column shows yes/no/partial, not empty) — grading completeness >80%
experiment-learnings.md contains structured sections: Known Patterns, Uncertain Patterns, Unknown Territory, Dead Ends — each with evidence citations
session_start.sh displays prediction accuracy with trend (last 5 vs previous 5) and calibration context
graded predictions produce mechanism-based model_updates, not tautologies ('Score reached' = rejected)
wrong predictions surface in session boot card and /plan session context with area keywords
dead ends from experiment-learnings.md block re-proposing failed approaches in /plan
predictions traceable: prediction → action → grade → model_update → experiment-learnings → next prediction cites learning
craft_criteria: missing predictions.tsv doesn't crash session_start (fallback: predictions unknown)
ungraded predictions excluded from accuracy calculation, never counted as failures
TSV parsing handles edge cases: empty fields, shifted columns, malformed dates
division-by-zero protection when no predictions graded
atomic writes (mktemp + mv) prevent corruption on interrupt
vague predictions without measurable targets produce quality gate warning
knowledge model deduplication prevents duplicate entries across grade runs
stale knowledge entries detected and flagged (>30 days, not referenced by recent predictions)
known_gaps: no mechanical enforcement that predictions cite experiment-learnings — happens by convention
consolidator agent exists but is only wired to /retro, not triggered after grade.sh
